messages.content: Our iOS app keeps getting rejected during App Store review. Common reasons and how to avoid them?

Most common rejection reasons and fixes:

**1. Guideline 2.1 - Performance: App Completeness**
- Broken links, placeholder content, crash logs
- Fix: Thorough QA on the exact build submitted. Test on oldest supported device.

**2. Guideline 4.3 - Design: Spam**
- App too similar to existing apps or your own other apps
- Fix: Ensure unique value proposition, distinct UI

**3. Guideline 5.1.1 - Data Collection**
- Privacy nutrition labels don't match actual data collection
- Fix: Audit all SDKs (Firebase, analytics, ads) for data they collect. Update labels.

**4. Guideline 3.1.1 - In-App Purchase**
- Using external payment for digital goods
- Fix: Use StoreKit for digital content. Physical goods/services can use external payment.

**5. Guideline 2.5.1 - Only use public APIs**
- Using private/undocumented APIs
- Fix: Audit dependencies. Some older RN libraries use private APIs.

**Pre-submission checklist**:
- Test on oldest supported iOS version
- Fill out all App Privacy details accurately
- Provide demo account credentials for review team
- Include clear description of all features
- Test IAP in sandbox environment
